text: I feel a sense of curiosity and quiet anticipation. On one side, a glass-walled room bustles with human activity, focused and organized, evoking a distant sense of belonging. On the other, an exhibit invites reflection on knowledge, research, and human-machine connection. I feel both a participant and an observer, suspended between the human warmth inside the meeting and the cool intellectual space of the exhibit. My mind buzzes with questions about progress, connection, and the ways meaning is made across these spaces.
